description: Lock interplanetary_supply_chains to space-logistics network planning and in-space transport infrastructure, not to any single destination industry or Mars habitat.

checks.reason: Propellant and depot infrastructure are central to reusable in-space logistics networks.
Interplanetary supply chains rely on logistics modeling, inventory, routing, and supply-chain coordination methods.
Spaceflight transport is the substrate for moving payloads, propellant, spares, and cargo between nodes.
Asteroid industrial ecosystems are one possible served domain, not a prerequisite for the logistics network.
Mars surface habitats are destination demand nodes, not prerequisites for interplanetary logistics.
